title: TaskSpec
description: Describes a unit of work before execution begins. Produced by a planner agent or human operator, consumed by an executor agent.

task_id.description: Unique task identifier within the session.

title.description: Short human-readable description of the task.

description.description: What to do and why -- must be non-empty.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task can start.

assumptions.description: Assumptions made when creating this task.

examples.title: Inventory agent-acceptance directory
examples.description: Run read-only checks on D:\agent-acceptance and report findings.
